name: Razer Viper V4 Pro - Black
description: Symmetrical, ultra-lightweight wireless esports mouse in classic Black, optimized for claw and fingertip grips.
product_issues: Smooth coating can feel slippery for users with dry hands; minor pre-travel on the side buttons.

name: Razer Basilisk V3 Pro 35K - Black
description: Ergonomic wireless gaming mouse featuring Razer's ultra-precise 35K optical sensor and customizable underglow in Black.
product_issues: Smart-reel scroll wheel can rattle slightly during fast swipes; heavier weight isn't ideal for competitive flick shots.

name: Razer Viper V4 Pro - White
description: Symmetrical, ultra-lightweight wireless esports mouse in a clean White finish, engineered for competitive FPS gaming.
product_issues: White matte coating requires frequent cleaning to prevent yellowing or dirt buildup.

name: Razer Naga V2 HyperSpeed
description: Wireless MMO/MOBA gaming mouse with customizable side button plates and HyperSpeed connectivity for lag-free raiding.
product_issues: Relies on AA batteries instead of internal USB-C recharging; side plate magnets can attract debris.

name: Razer Cobra - Cinnamoroll Edition
description: Lightweight wired gaming mouse featuring a special Sanrio Cinnamoroll theme, bringing pastel aesthetics to your setup.
product_issues: Pastel aesthetic coating is highly prone to staining from hand oils over time.

name: Razer DeathAdder V3
description: Wired ergonomic gaming mouse carrying the legendary DeathAdder shape, significantly reduced in weight for modern esports.
product_issues: Completely lacks RGB lighting which some users expect; right-handed ergonomic shape alienates left-handed users.

name: Razer Blade 16 - QHD+ 240 Hz OLED - GeForce RTX 5060 - Black
description: Premium 16-inch gaming laptop featuring a QHD+ 240 Hz OLED display, powered by the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060, in a sleek Black CNC aluminum chassis.
product_issues: Fans can get noticeably loud during prolonged AAA gaming; matte chassis attracts fingerprints.

name: Razer Blade 16 - QHD+ 240 Hz OLED - GeForce RTX 5090 - Black
description: Enthusiast-grade 16-inch powerhouse with a QHD+ 240 Hz OLED screen and top-tier NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 graphics, finished in Black.
product_issues: Requires aggressive fan profiles to prevent thermal throttling on the 5090; very bulky power adapter.

name: Refurbished Razer Blade 14 - 3K 120 Hz OLED - GeForce RTX 5060 - Black
description: Highly portable, refurbished 14-inch gaming laptop equipped with a stunning 3K 120 Hz OLED panel and an RTX 5060 GPU.
product_issues: RAM is soldered and cannot be upgraded later; potential for minor battery degradation in refurbished units.

name: Razer Blade 18 - Dual UHD+ 240 Hz | FHD+ 440 Hz - GeForce RTX 5090 - Black
description: Massive 18-inch desktop replacement featuring a dual-mode display (UHD+ 240 Hz or FHD+ 440 Hz) and the flagship RTX 5090.
product_issues: Extremely heavy and difficult to fit in standard bags; switching display modes sometimes prompts a system reboot.

name: Razer Blade 16 - QHD+ 240 Hz OLED - GeForce RTX 5090 - Black
description: Enthusiast-grade 16-inch powerhouse with a QHD+ 240 Hz OLED screen and top-tier NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 graphics, finished in Black.
product_issues: Requires aggressive fan profiles to prevent thermal throttling on the 5090; very bulky power adapter.

name: Razer Ornata V3 Tenkeyless - US - Cinnamoroll Edition
description: Low-profile mecha-membrane tenkeyless keyboard adorned with a Sanrio Cinnamoroll pastel blue and white design.
product_issues: White ABS keycaps get shiny very quickly; mecha-membrane switches lack the durability of true mechanicals.

name: Razer Huntsman V3 Pro 8KHz - US - Black
description: Full-sized analog optical gaming keyboard with rapid trigger and an ultra-fast 8000Hz polling rate in Black.
product_issues: Analog rapid-trigger actuation has a steep learning curve; chassis can produce a hollow pinging sound when bottoming out keys.

name: Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro - Orange Switch - US - Black
description: Flagship full-sized mechanical keyboard featuring tactile, quiet Orange switches, dedicated macro keys, and immersive underglow.
product_issues: Requires two USB ports to fully power the keyboard and underglow wrist rest; left-side macro keys cause accidental misclicks during regular typing.

name: Razer Huntsman V3 Pro Tenkeyless 8KHz - US - Black
description: Compact TKL analog optical gaming keyboard delivering 8000Hz polling and adjustable actuation for competitive play.
product_issues: Lacks dedicated media keys found on the full-size version; high 8KHz polling can cause CPU spikes in older games.

name: Razer Ornata V3 Tenkeyless - US - Kuromi Edition
description: Low-profile mecha-membrane tenkeyless keyboard featuring an edgy, purple-and-black Sanrio Kuromi aesthetic.
product_issues: Purple legend printing can be hard to read in low light when RGB is turned off.

name: Razer Wolverine V3 Pro - Black
description: Elite wireless controller for Xbox and PC featuring customizable back paddles, mechanical buttons, and trigger stops.
product_issues: Thumbstick tension is not manually adjustable; back paddles are placed slightly too central for small hands.

name: Razer Raiju V3 Pro - Esports Green Edition
description: Advanced PlayStation and PC controller in Razer's signature Esports Green, featuring mecha-tactile buttons and interchangeable thumbsticks.
product_issues: Accompanying mobile app for remaps can be buggy on iOS 17+; occasional Bluetooth disconnects on PC.

name: Razer Raiju V3 Pro - Black
description: Advanced PlayStation and PC wireless controller in standard Black, equipped with mecha-tactile action buttons.
product_issues: Accompanying mobile app for remaps can be buggy on iOS 17+; occasional Bluetooth disconnects on PC.

name: Razer Wolverine V3 Pro 8K PC - Black
description: Premium wireless PC controller with an 8000Hz polling rate mode for zero-latency inputs and mechanical microswitches.
product_issues: 8K polling mode only works on PC and requires a wired connection; slightly short included USB cable.

name: Razer Wolverine V3 Tournament Edition - Black
description: Wired tournament-grade controller with mechanical switches and extra remappable bumpers focused on professional play.
product_issues: Wired only, limiting living room setups; braided cable is thick and can drag slightly on the desk.

name: Razer Hammerhead V3 X HyperSpeed for Xbox
description: Wireless gaming earbuds explicitly licensed and tuned for Xbox, offering low-latency audio via an included USB-C dongle.
product_issues: Earbud battery drains under 4 hours when both ANC and RGB are active; glossy charging case scratches easily.

name: Razer Kraken Kitty V2 - Gengar Edition
description: USB wired gaming headset featuring iconic glowing Kitty ears and a playful purple design inspired by Pokémon's Gengar.
product_issues: Kitty ears add noticeable weight to the top band; purely wired connection restricts movement.

name: Razer Hammerhead V3 HyperSpeed
description: Multi-platform true wireless gaming earbuds boasting active noise cancellation and a 2.4GHz low-latency dongle.
product_issues: Dongle width can block adjacent USB-C ports on laptops; default ear tips may not provide a tight seal for bass.

name: Razer Hammerhead V3 X HyperSpeed for PlayStation
description: PlayStation-licensed wireless gaming earbuds with active noise cancellation and low-latency HyperSpeed technology.
product_issues: Earbud battery drains under 4 hours when both ANC and RGB are active; glossy charging case scratches easily.

name: Razer Kraken V4 X - Cinnamoroll Edition
description: Lightweight gaming headset coated in Sanrio Cinnamoroll colors, providing 7.1 surround sound and plush memory foam.
product_issues: THX spatial audio software often conflicts with Discord voice processing; heavy clamping force out of the box.

name: Razer BlackShark V2 HyperSpeed
description: Ultra-lightweight wireless esports headset with triforce titanium drivers and a hyperclear supercardioid mic.
product_issues: Wire hinge mechanism looks and feels somewhat fragile; volume knob can become scratchy over time.

name: Razer BlackShark V3
description: Next-generation wired esports headset boasting enhanced passive noise cancellation and upgraded aviation-style audio drivers.
product_issues: Microphone sidetone volume is relatively low; ear cushions trap heat during summer months.

name: Razer Soma Chroma
description: Immersive desktop gaming soundbar featuring dynamic Razer Chroma RGB underglow and room-filling spatial audio.
product_issues: Takes up significant desk space beneath the monitor; lacks a dedicated external subwoofer for deep bass.

name: Razer Iskur V2 NewGen - Black
description: Premium ergonomic gaming chair with a dynamic lumbar curve, featuring a sleek, all-black professional aesthetic.
product_issues: Aggressive bucket seat bolsters restrict wide-leg sitting or cross-legged positions; synthetic leather can peel in highly humid environments.

name: Razer Iskur V2 NewGen - Black / Green
description: Premium gaming chair with an adaptive lumbar support system, dressed in Razer's signature Black and Green synthetic leather.
product_issues: Aggressive bucket seat bolsters restrict wide-leg sitting or cross-legged positions; synthetic leather can peel in highly humid environments.

name: Razer Iskur V2 X NewGen - Cinnamoroll Edition
description: Essential ergonomic gaming chair completely restyled with an adorable Sanrio Cinnamoroll pastel theme.
product_issues: Aggressive bucket seat bolsters restrict wide-leg sitting or cross-legged positions; synthetic leather can peel in highly humid environments.

name: Razer Iskur V2 X NewGen - Black / Green
description: Streamlined essential gaming chair providing core ergonomic support in standard Razer Black and Green.
product_issues: Aggressive bucket seat bolsters restrict wide-leg sitting or cross-legged positions; synthetic leather can peel in highly humid environments.

name: Razer Seiren V3 Pro
description: Professional-grade dynamic USB microphone for broadcasters, featuring advanced voice isolation and a built-in high-pass filter.
product_issues: Requires a robust boom arm due to its heavy weight; default gain is set too high out of the box.

name: Razer Kiyo V2 - Black
description: High-end streaming webcam with a large adaptive light sensor, capable of uncompressed 1080p 60fps or 4K recording.
product_issues: Autofocus tends to hunt frequently if there is a strong backlight; requires Synapse running for advanced features.

name: Razer Seiren V3 Mini
description: Ultra-compact condenser microphone ideal for minimalist setups, delivering crisp, clear voice capture without taking up desk space.
product_issues: Lacks an physical mute button or gain dial on the microphone body; picks up keyboard vibrations from the desk stand.

name: Razer Seiren V3 Chroma
description: Vibrant USB condenser microphone that reacts to stream events with fully customizable 360-degree Chroma RGB lighting.
product_issues: Touch-to-mute sensor on top is overly sensitive; RGB lighting can cause glare on monitors in dark rooms.

name: Razer Kiyo V2 X
description: Accessible 1080p streaming webcam focused on sharp image quality and smart autofocus for everyday content creation.
product_issues: Image quality degrades heavily in low light; fixed USB cable means you cannot swap for a longer cord.

name: Razer Gigantus V2 Pro - Balance - Black
description: Large cloth gaming mouse pad with a micro-weaved surface tailored for a perfect balance of speed and control.
product_issues: Stitched edges can begin to fray after heavy machine washing; takes a few days to lay completely flat after unrolling.

name: Razer Sphex V3 - Small
description: Ultra-thin, hard gaming mouse mat in a small form factor, designed for seamless desk integration and fast swipes.
product_issues: Adhesive base loses stickiness if moved between desks frequently; hard surface wears down PTFE mouse skates rapidly.

name: Razer Strider - XXL - Black
description: Massive XXL hybrid mouse mat combining the slick glides of a hard surface with the rollable portability of a cloth base.
product_issues: Stitched edges can begin to fray after heavy machine washing; takes a few days to lay completely flat after unrolling.

name: Razer Atlas Pro - Black
description: Premium tempered glass gaming mouse mat ensuring zero-resistance glides and maximum durability in a stealth Black finish.
product_issues: Tempered glass destroys standard PTFE mouse skates in weeks; requires specialized dot skates for longevity; surface feels cold to the touch.

name: Razer Viper V3 Pro + Gigantus V2 - Counter-Strike 2 Edition Bundle
description: Exclusive competitive bundle pairing the Viper V3 Pro wireless mouse with a custom Counter-Strike 2 edition Gigantus V2 pad.
product_issues: Stitched edges can begin to fray after heavy machine washing; takes a few days to lay completely flat after unrolling.

name: Razer Viper V3 Pro SE - Wuthering Waves Edition
description: Special edition Viper V3 Pro featuring exclusive artwork and design inspired by the action RPG Wuthering Waves.
product_issues: Custom artwork can slowly fade on the primary clickers under heavy friction.

name: Razer Enki X - BLACKPINK Edition
description: All-day comfort gaming chair featuring exclusive BLACKPINK branding, pink accents, and a wide seat base.
product_issues: Does not include the premium magnetic memory foam head cushion; armrests are only 2D adjustable.

name: Razer Ornata V3 Tenkeyless - US - Espeon & Umbreon Edition
description: Tenkeyless mecha-membrane keyboard highlighting an exclusive Pokémon Espeon & Umbreon day/night thematic design.
product_issues: Custom keycaps cannot be easily replaced with standard aftermarket sets due to the low-profile switch stems.

name: Razer Kraken V4 X - Espeon & Umbreon Edition
description: Wired gaming headset featuring a unique split-color design honoring Pokémon's Espeon and Umbreon.
product_issues: THX spatial audio software often conflicts with Discord voice processing; heavy clamping force out of the box.

name: Razer Rogue 16 Backpack V4
description: Versatile 16-inch daily commuter backpack with dedicated, padded compartments for laptops, tablets, and gaming accessories.
product_issues: Water-resistant coating degrades after the first year of heavy rain exposure; inner zippers can sometimes catch on the bright green lining.

name: Razer Rogue 18 Backpack V4
description: Spacious, heavy-duty 18-inch gaming backpack featuring a tear-resistant exterior, perfect for massive desktop replacement laptops.
product_issues: Water-resistant coating degrades after the first year of heavy rain exposure; inner zippers can sometimes catch on the bright green lining.

name: Razer Rogue 14 Backpack V3
description: Compact and lightweight 14-inch backpack tailored specifically for thin-and-light gaming setups like the Razer Blade 14.
product_issues: Water-resistant coating degrades after the first year of heavy rain exposure; inner zippers can sometimes catch on the bright green lining.

name: Razer Rogue 15.6 Backpack V2
description: Classic 15.6-inch water-resistant rolltop backpack optimized for protecting standard gaming laptops from the elements.
product_issues: Water-resistant coating degrades after the first year of heavy rain exposure; inner zippers can sometimes catch on the bright green lining.

name: Razer Scout 15 Backpack
description: Urban-styled 15-inch lifestyle backpack featuring quick-access pockets and durable webbing for everyday gamers on the go.
product_issues: Water-resistant coating degrades after the first year of heavy rain exposure; inner zippers can sometimes catch on the bright green lining.

name: Razer Kishi V3 Pro XL
description: Oversized premium mobile controller designed to fit larger smartphones and phablets, offering console-level tactile inputs.
product_issues: Does not securely hold standard-sized phones; pass-through charging causes older phones to overheat.

name: Razer Kishi V3 Pro
description: Standard-sized premium mobile gaming controller delivering seamless USB-C connectivity and console-quality microswitches.
product_issues: Not compatible with thick protective phone cases; analog sticks have smaller travel distance than console controllers.
